commit.message:
Add astronomy dark mode and daytime light mode backgrounds (#6)

Dark mode now renders a deep space scene: a gradient from near-black
navy to dark purple, 200 randomly placed twinkling stars (CSS keyframe
animation with per-star duration/delay), a Mars-like rocky planet with
a small moon in the upper-right, and a Neptune-like ice giant in the
lower-left.

Light mode renders a daytime sky: a gradient from vivid sky-blue to
near-white, a pulsing sun with animated glow in the upper-right, and
six softly drifting puffy clouds at varied sizes, speeds, and positions.

Implementation details:
- New ThemeBackground component renders as a fixed full-screen layer
  (z-index -10) behind all page content
- CSS keyframes in index.css: twinkle, cloud-float, sun-pulse
- Nav updated to bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-md
  so the scene is visible through the navigation bar
- App wrapper solid background removed; text colors retained for
  readability against both themed backgrounds

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: extract MAST proxy into separate lightweight service (#734)

* feat: extract MAST proxy into separate lightweight service

Split the monolithic processing engine into two services:
- MAST Proxy (main_mast.py): lightweight service for MAST search/download (~100-200MB)
- Processing Engine (main.py): heavy service for composites, mosaics, analysis (~2-4GB)

This ensures MAST searches remain responsive even during CPU/memory-intensive
image processing. The backend reads MastProxy:BaseUrl with fallback to
ProcessingEngine:BaseUrl for graceful degradation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update MAST resume tests to use main_mast app

Tests for MAST download resume routes need to import from main_mast
(the MAST proxy entrypoint) since MAST routes were removed from main.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: allow anonymous composite creation when data already exists

When all filter data was already downloaded, the guided create flow
incorrectly set pendingObs for anonymous users, triggering the "Sign in"
gate. Since generate-nchannel is [AllowAnonymous], anonymous users should
go straight to processing when no downloads are needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add E2E tests for anonymous guided create flow

Covers three scenarios:
- Anonymous user + data exists → composite completes without login
- Anonymous user + data needs download → shows login gate
- Anonymous user + data exists → auth gate never appears

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: show file and channel counts in composite processing step

Instead of "Loading files", now shows "Loading 5 files across 3 channels"
when channel/file info is available. Helps users understand what's happening
during the 30-90 second composite generation wait.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use explicit return 0 in doctor codex check to prevent set -e crash

Bare `return` in `_check_codex_reviewer` propagates exit code 1 from
`is_codex_configured` when codex is not in the reviewer list. Under
`set -euo pipefail`, this kills the entire doctor script — account
detection and smoke tests never run, and the exit code is 1 even
when all checks pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

hotfix: remove www→naked redirect causing infinite loop with Amplify

Amplify redirects admi.africa → www.admi.africa, but next.config
was redirecting www back to naked domain, creating infinite loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add /v1/messages/count_tokens endpoint (#36)

* Add /v1/messages/count_tokens endpoint for Claude Code token counting

Claude Code calls POST /v1/messages/count_tokens?beta=true to count
input tokens during conversations. This was returning 404. Add the
endpoint using the model's tokenizer (apply_chat_template with
tokenize=True) — no GPU inference needed, CPU-only tokenization.

Also extracts shared _apply_chat_template helper to eliminate
duplication between the text template and token counting paths,
and adds LoadedModel.text_tokenizer property to centralize VLM
processor unwrapping (previously repeated in 3 places).

Closes #35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review: run_in_executor, active_refs, and strict dict handling

- Offload count_chat_tokens to thread executor to avoid blocking the
  event loop on large conversations (BPE tokenization can be slow)
- Add active_refs protection around the await point for consistency
  with other inference paths
- Raise TypeError instead of silently returning 0 when
  apply_chat_template returns a dict without 'input_ids'
- Add test for dict-without-input_ids error path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix nested input_ids in dict return from apply_chat_template

When apply_chat_template returns {"input_ids": [[1,2,3,4,5]]},
len() was returning 1 (batch dimension) instead of 5 (token count).
Apply the same nested-list unwrap used for the top-level list branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review: keep_alive=0, docstrings, VLM test

- Pass keep_alive="0" to ensure_loaded so a model loaded solely for
  token counting is evicted promptly rather than pinned for 5 minutes
- Document add_generation_prompt=True intent in count_chat_tokens
- Document mlx-vlm processor shape in text_tokenizer property
- Add test for VLM text_tokenizer unwrapping in count_tokens path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Revert keep_alive=0 to avoid clobbering existing model expiry

keep_alive="0" causes ensure_loaded to reset expires_at to now for
already-loaded models, triggering premature eviction mid-session.
Use the default keep_alive instead — Claude Code only calls
count_tokens for models it's actively using.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace OpenCV Haar cascades with MediaPipe face detection for banner cropping

Haar cascades (2001-era) poorly detected tilted, dark-skinned, and partially
visible faces. MediaPipe BlazeFace is significantly more accurate across all
face types and angles. Model bundled as 230KB .tflite file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add listing detail page, fix auth, search filters, and seed script

- Listing detail page (/listings/[id]): CarsandBids-inspired layout with
  image gallery, two-column design, seller info, details grid, comments
  section, sticky sidebar with price/offer/trade/share
- Fix auth: re-add Supabase login/signup with error handling, navbar
  auth state, middleware session refresh, auth callback route
- Browse filters: search bar, series/condition dropdowns, sort options
  (newest, oldest, price asc/desc), URL search params, result count
- Homepage: pulls featured listings from Supabase with static fallback
- Seed script: creates 20 fake profiles + 100 listings with realistic
  Hot Wheels data (scripts/seed.js)

fix: clicking secondary pane auto-switches main TF (no symbol change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use mine=true for exact (unrounded) subscriber count from YouTube API

The channels.list call was using id:[CHANNEL_ID] which returns YouTube's
publicly-rounded subscriber count. Switching to mine:true with OAuth2 auth
returns the exact number since the authenticated user owns the channel.

fix: lazy Prisma client to fix Docker build without DATABASE_URL

Use a Proxy to defer PrismaClient creation until first property access.
During Next.js build, db.ts is imported but no DB calls are made,
so the missing DATABASE_URL no longer causes a build failure.

commit.message:
Cron overhaul: conversational tone, reliable delivery, safety guardrails

Rewrite cron prompt to produce casual DM-style output instead of robotic
reports. Remove aggressive narration filters that stripped valid conversational
responses. Track notification delivery failures in run logs. Add 10-minute
timeout for standard cron jobs to prevent scheduler hangs. Truncate oversized
messages before channel dispatch. Improve transient error classification.

commit.message:
Add date-range sidebar controls for view and reference filtering

Adds two sidebar groups — Date range (since/until) and Reference range
(ref_since/ref_until) — that filter which photos appear in each view and
which labeled faces serve as classification anchors respectively.

- db.py: load_photo_dates now returns EXIF-only dates (no mtime fallback);
  photos without EXIF always pass date filters; add photo_date_coverage()
- algo.py: add ref_since/ref_until params; fix null-date → include;
  filter labeled anchors by reference range when computing candidates
- photos.py: add GET /api/photos/date_coverage; fix null-date → include
- faces.py: add since/until to unlabeled and similar endpoints
- classify.py: add ref_since/ref_until throughout; update cache key
- people.py: add since/until to list_person_faces; fix null-date in get_person
- index.html: add sb-group-daterange and sb-group-refrange sidebar groups
- app.css: add .year-range and .year-range-hint styles; widen sidebar to 210px
- app.js: wire date inputs with localStorage persistence; fetch DB coverage
  hint; propagate date params to all view API calls

commit.message:
refactor: use RilayInstance interface instead of ril class in public APIs

FormConfiguration.config, fromSchema(), validateSchema(), form builder,
and RepeatableBuilder now accept RilayInstance<C> instead of the concrete
ril<C> class. This makes the rilaykit wrapper (RilayKit<C>) directly
compatible without type casts.

feat: add serverless Gemini proxy, remove BYOK requirement

- Add Vercel serverless function (api/generate-visual.js) that proxies
  Gemini API calls with server-side key and Firebase auth verification
- Rate limit AI generation to 20 requests/day per user via Firestore
- Remove API key settings UI from Header (no more gear icon)
- Remove AI visuals tab and rendering from Moodboard (inspiration path)

- Frontend falls back to BYOK for local dev if proxy unavailable

Requires GEMINI_API_KEY env var in Vercel dashboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(engine): use event timestamps for match_duration_ms and match_rate

match_duration_ms and match_rate were computed from wall-clock elapsed
time (Instant::elapsed), not event timestamps. In preload/batch mode,
all events process in microseconds, giving absurd rates (~30,000/s
instead of ~3/s). Now computed from first/last stack entry event
timestamps (DateTime<Utc>), which correctly reflect the @Ns offsets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add single order import (menu option 5)

Allows importing a single order by PIM ID: triggers CSV export,
downloads from FTP, and runs customer/order import with user
confirmation between steps. Warns if the order was already imported.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: deprecate requiresPreds — replace with auto-detected hasChains

requiresPreds was a manual config flag that the auto-detect logic already
computed from task linkIds. Replaced with hasChains (computed, not
configured). Removed from IAppSettings interface, settings DTO, hydrator,
config store interface, and tenant config files. 642 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: progress bar always moves, deduplicate live object chips (#68)

- Fake timer runs continuously; real SignalR progress pushes floor up.
  Bar = max(fake, real) so it never stalls between SignalR events.
- Deduplicate live object chips by objectType+label to prevent
  duplicate entries from appearing during analysis.

Add automated transliteration to enrich-books cron (Phase 3)

Romanizes OCR text for non-Latin scripts (Greek, Hebrew, Arabic, etc.)
as part of the enrich-books cron. Runs independently of pipeline state —
processes any book with OCR'd pages missing transliteration. 10 books and
200 pages per run, 10 concurrent Gemini calls. Pausable via
paused_phases: ['transliteration'].

commit.message:
Add Email Campaigns — bulk email interface with templates, audience selection, SSE progress

New features:
- /admin/campaigns page with full campaign composer UI
- Six professional templates: Product Update, Demo Invite, Monthly Roundup,
  Academy Promo, Follow-up Check-in, Custom (blank)
- Five audience sources: Newsletter subscribers, Main site contacts,
  Academy contacts, Demo bookings, Academy enrolments — each with filters
  and per-row checkboxes
- Manual recipient entry: add one-at-a-time with Name+Email form, or bulk
  paste comma/newline/semicolon-separated emails (supports Name <email> format)
- Auto-deduplication across all sources by email address
- {{name}} and {{company}} personalisation tokens substituted per recipient
- HTML email preview via iframe with first recipient's real data
- From address selection: hello@ or training@chrysoliteai.com
- POST /api/admin/send-campaign — streaming SSE endpoint, sends sequentially
  with batch pauses to respect Resend rate limits, reports real-time progress
- Confirmation modal with full recipient list before sending
- Live progress bar and sent/failed counters during send
- Results summary with failed address list after send
- Campaigns nav item (Megaphone icon) added to admin sidebar

commit.message:
feat: add comma-trigger and blur-commit to TagEditor for intuitive tag entry

TagEditor only created tags on Enter key, which was undiscoverable. Users
typing commas (the universal tag convention) got commas embedded in tag
values, causing frontend/backend state mismatch errors.

Fix: comma now triggers tag creation, and blur commits uncommitted text
(so clicking Save auto-captures pending tags). Includes unit, UI component,
and E2E tests covering the full round-trip.
